coupling.note: Fix 1 touches two packages; Fix 3 adds appendLine to AppFileSystem.Interface. No new cross-package import coupling.

debuggability.note: Fix 1 Effect.dieSync loses error argument. Fix 3 queue silently swallows errors on prior failure. No Effect.logWarning in error paths.

convergence.note: All fixes directly address root causes from concurrency audit: non-atomic ID counter (CRITICAL), non-atomic writes, non-atomic JSONL appends.

surface_area.note: Fix 1 return type change affects ~18 files. Plan undercounts sync callers in withStatics. Fix 3 sites are 28, not 10+.

testability.note: Each fix testable in isolation. Fix 1 needs fiber-racing test. Fix 2 needs crash-during-write test. Fix 3 needs concurrent-append test.

error_clarity.note: No error path logging. Fix 3 queue error propagation unaddressed. Effect.dieSync loses caller stack.

reversibility.note: Three fixes touch different files and are independently revertible.

objections.summary: Fix 1 return type change contaminates 18+ callers, not ~10
objections.evidence: packages/core/src/event.ts:10, session.ts:10, account.ts:11/90/215 use Identifier inside withStatics callbacks at module evaluation time, requiring Effect.runSync wrapping
packages/opencode/src/id/id.ts:74 uses Effect.dieSync instead of proper tagged error. Proposed identifier.ts replacement should not repeat this pattern.

objections.summary: Fix 3 append queue silently swallows errors on prior failure
objections.evidence: Map<string, Promise<void>> chaining pattern poisons the queue on first rejection — subsequent appends silently fail. No error recovery mechanism.

objections.summary: Fix 1 module-level Effect.runSync compounds existing CRITICAL finding
objections.evidence: Existing audit (effect-runtime-hunt.v1.json) flags module-level Effect.runSync as CRITICAL. id/id.ts:9 already uses it. identifier.ts proposal would add a second instance.
grep for flag:"a" returns 28 matches in 26 files under packages/opencode/src/tool/
packages/opencode/src/tool/tool-feedback.ts:87-131 does full JSONL read-parse-modify-write. Fix 3's appendLine queue doesn't solve this separate race class.

conditions: Replace Effect.runSync(Ref.make(...)) at module scope with lazy initialization pattern in identifier.ts; file follow-up finding for the already-existing instance in id/id.ts:9
Add error recovery to Fix 3 append queue: reset per-file entry on failure, log structured warning with Effect.annotateCurrentSpan
Use proper Effect error type (tagged error or Effect.fail) instead of Effect.dieSync in identifier error paths
Explicitly list all 26+ tool-file sites for Fix 3; call out tool-feedback.ts read-modify-write as deferred separate lane
Specify test plan: fiber-racing ID uniqueness test, crash-during-atomic-write test, concurrent-append ordering test
key_finding: Fix 1 for packages/opencode/src/id/id.ts is already implemented (uses Effect, Ref, returns Effect.Effect<string>). The actual remaining work is packages/core/src/util/identifier.ts conversion + caller updates + Fixes 2 and 3 from scratch.
follow_up_issues: Refactor id/id.ts module-level Effect.runSync to lazy initialization
File separate plan for tool-feedback.ts read-modify-write race
Add Map cleanup mechanism for Fix 3 append queue to prevent unbounded growth
Consider consolidating the two Identifier modules (opencode/src/id/id.ts and core/src/util/identifier.ts)
